calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Application For A Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lewis Gillian, #12355.

William W. Bunting, III, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Moving Brands Inc.,
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s)CX INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
Nick Monkhouse worn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $72,811.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 8%: $17,002.61
Attorney's Fees: $23.380.00
Costs: $600.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $113,793.61
Judgment signed in open court.
